personalizationPage.title: Personalization
personalizationPage.subtitle: Auto session title and Agent companion

permissionsPage.title: Permission management
permissionsPage.subtitle: Accelerated workspace search, tool execution, tool definition loading, Computer use, browser control, and debug mode

sessionTitle.title: Auto Session Title
sessionTitle.subtitle: AI automatically generates concise titles for new conversations
sessionTitle.warning: Session title will use first 20 characters of user message

agentCompanion.title: Agent companion
agentCompanion.subtitle: Control where the BitFun companion appears.
agentCompanion.displayModeDescription: Show the companion inside the input, or as a floating desktop pet outside the app.
agentCompanion.displayInputDesc: Show it when the chat input is collapsed.
agentCompanion.displayDesktopDesc: Show a borderless always-on-top mini window outside the app. Drag to move it.
agentCompanion.petDescription: Choose a preset, or import a Petdex zip downloaded from petdex.crafter.run.
agentCompanion.importHint: Download an appearance zip from https://petdex.crafter.run/zh, then import it here.
agentCompanion.importFailed: Failed to import Agent companion appearance
agentCompanion.deleteConfirmBody: Delete this imported companion from your device? This cannot be undone.

workspaceSearch.title: Accelerated workspace search
workspaceSearch.subtitle: Use flashgrep-backed indexed search for local workspaces. When off, BitFun falls back to legacy search.

toolExecution.sectionDescription: Confirmation and timeout settings when tools run in a session.

permissionPolicy.sectionDescription: Choose the default tool access policy and how permission prompts are handled.
permissionPolicy.askDescription: Low-risk reads, browsing, Task, and Skill are allowed automatically; file changes, commands, and other restricted actions require approval.
permissionPolicy.fullAccessDescription: Tools are allowed by default, while explicit deny rules, product restrictions, and operating system permissions still apply.
permissionPolicy.fullAccessWarningMessage: Full access allows tools to read and write files, run commands, and call integrations without asking each time. Explicit deny rules, product restrictions, and operating system permissions still apply.
permissionPolicy.autoApproveDescription: Automatically approve only actions that evaluate to Ask. Denied actions remain blocked, and no remembered grant is created.

projectPermissions.description: Always allow decisions are saved as remembered grants for the current project; static project rules apply before a tool runs.
projectPermissions.grantsEmpty: No remembered grants for the current project.
projectPermissions.removeGrantMessage: Remove the remembered {{action}} grant for {{resource}}? The next matching request will ask again.
projectPermissions.clearGrantsMessage: Remove every remembered permission grant for the current project? The next matching requests will ask again.
projectPermissions.rulesLoadFailed: Failed to load static project rules
projectPermissions.rulesSaveFailed: Failed to save static project rules
projectPermissions.rulesConflict: The rules file changed outside BitFun. Reopen project permissions before saving.

deferredToolLoading.sectionDescription: Load detailed schemas for some tools only when needed, including a subset of built-in tools and all MCP tools.
deferredToolLoading.warning: Each request now sends full schemas for enabled tools. Configuring many MCP tools uses more tokens.

computerUse.sectionDescription: In the BitFun desktop app, the assistant can capture the screen and control the mouse and keyboard; requires a multimodal model for vision.
computerUse.enableDesc: When off, the ComputerUse tool stays disabled in every session mode.
computerUse.accessibilityDesc: macOS: lets BitFun read on-screen UI elements and send mouse/keyboard input to other apps. Not applicable on Windows; on Linux this requires an X11 session.
computerUse.screenCaptureDesc: Lets BitFun capture screenshots of your screen so the assistant can see what it is controlling.
computerUse.desktopOnly: Computer use settings are only available in the BitFun desktop app.

browserControl.sectionDescription: Choose a browser and start CDP control.
browserControl.desktopOnly: Browser control is only available in the BitFun desktop app.
browserControl.preferredBrowserDesc: Choose which browser BitFun controls through CDP. Default follows the system default browser.
browserControl.restartFailed: Failed to restart browser with debug mode enabled

restartModal.title: Enable browser debug mode
restartModal.description: {{browser}} is already running and the current instance was not started with the debug port enabled. BitFun needs to restart the browser in debug mode before it can control it.
restartModal.warning: This will close the current browser windows.

browserControl.createLauncherDesc: Create a browser shortcut with the debug port enabled.

models.empty: No available models. Please add models in "Models" first.
